data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having an inspection history by equipment serial number. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or records of inspection history linked to specific equipment serial numbers, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary data to confirm this requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of inspection history by equipment serial number.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
